Michael Johnson
Atlanta, GA

Summary
Dedicated forklift operator with over 4 years of experience in warehouse environments. Proven ability to safely operate various types of forklifts, including reach trucks and counterbalance units. Strong knowledge of warehouse management systems (WMS) and commitment to adhering to safety standards.

Experience

Forklift Operator
ABC Distribution Center, Atlanta, GA  
March 2020 - Present  
- Operate reach trucks and counterbalance forklifts to move and stack materials efficiently.
- Conduct daily inspections of equipment to ensure compliance with OSHA standards.
- Collaborate with team members to improve warehouse operations and reduce loading times by 15%.
- Utilize WMS for inventory management and tracking shipments.

Warehouse Associate  
XYZ Logistics, Marietta, GA  
June 2018 - February 2020  
- Assisted in the loading and unloading of freight using forklifts and pallet jacks.
- Maintained a clean and organized work environment while adhering to safety protocols.
- Gained experience working with WMS to process incoming and outgoing shipments.

Certifications
- OSHA Forklift Certification (Class I/IV/V)
- Forklift Safety Training

Skills
- Forklift operation (reach truck, counterbalance)
- Warehouse Management Systems (WMS) experience
- Strong attention to safety and detail
- Team collaboration and communication

Education
High School Diploma  
Atlanta High School, Atlanta, GA  
Graduated: May 2016
